title: AFK Fishing
description: Automatically reels in and recasts your fishing rod when a catch is detected, perfect for AFK fishing.
body:
# AFK Fishing
AFK Fishing is a lightweight, client-side Fabric mod that fully automates AFK fishing in Minecraft. Cast once and let the mod handle the rest — no interaction needed. Since it runs entirely on the client, it works seamlessly on multiplayer servers without any server-side installation.

---

## Features
- **Reliable Bite Detection** — Uses game state variables (`DATA_BITING`) instead of audio cues, ensuring instant and accurate detection every time — even with the game muted.
- **Automatic Recasting** — Reels in and recasts automatically after each catch with a natural delay (15 ticks / ~750ms).
- **Clean HUD Overlay** — Displays a minimal status indicator showing whether AFK Fishing is `ENABLED` or `DISABLED`. Only visible while holding a fishing rod, so it never clutters your screen.
- **One-Key Toggle** — Enable or disable the mod instantly with a fully customizable hotkey (default: `O`).
- **Command Support** — Full slash command and dot-command support for flexibility in any server environment.

---

## How to Use
1. Hold a **Fishing Rod** — the HUD indicator will appear near the top-left of your screen.
2. Press **`O`** to toggle AFK Fishing on or off, or use `/autofisher on` · `/autofisher off` in chat.
3. Cast your rod once — the mod handles everything from there.

---

## Commands
| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/autofisher on` · `.autofisher on` | Enables the auto-fisher |
| `/autofisher off` · `.autofisher off` | Disables the auto-fisher |
| `/autofisher status` · `.autofisher status` | Shows current status in chat |
| `/autofisher hud on/off` · `.autofisher hud on/off` | Toggles the HUD overlay |

---

## Compatibility
| | |
|---|---|
| **Platform** | Fabric Loader |
| **Side** | Client-side only |
| **Java** | Java 21+ |
| **Dependencies** | Fabric API |

*Client-side only — works on any server.*

---
